original_image_tags: Brown manila document folder or jacket. The folder has multiple stamps, labels, and barcodes. At the top left is a white label with a barcode and the number `RRP003IKGU` and the date `8/11/1274188`. Below the barcode, vertical text reads `FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER` and `HQ - HEADQUARTERS`. To the right of the barcode, text reads `Class / Case #` `Sub` `Vol.` `Serial #` with the values `0062 83894` `6` `246` `301`. A blue stamp box at the top center reads: `Declassification authority derived from FBI Automatic Declassification Guide, issued May 24, 2007.` A white label at the top right has a barcode and the number `

elements.description: Page displaying a brown file folder cover or backing. Visual elements include multiple administrative stamps and labels: a vertical white label on the left with a barcode and text; a white label at the top center regarding declassification authority; a vertical white label on the right with a barcode; and several red and green ink stamps including 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'COPIED FOR FOIPA', 'INVESTIGATION', 'USE CARE IN HANDLING THIS FILE', 'DO NOT DESTROY', and 'Transfer-Call 421 FOIPA # 993087'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (brown folder cover with stamps and labels) and categories, but Description A provides specific quoted text and dates from labels that Description B omits without contradiction.
